title: Upsert Tenant Contacts via SQLite ON CONFLICT
summary: Idempotently insert or update tenant-scoped contacts by the unique key tenant_id plus email in SQLite.
highlights: Works for single or batch writes
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and SQLite 3.51.0 on macOS. Verified behavior covers insert, update, tenant-scoped uniqueness, null updates, batch execution, and isolation of unrelated rows.
